creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
This is a routine bugfix update to the latest released version.

Note: This should be applied after the patches from pr ports/133960
which is still being processed.

ChangeLog:

    http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=678278

Announce Message:

    "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.1.4, a bugfix version. 	

     Details will appear on http://phpmyadmin.net. In a hurry? you can
     visit http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin to download.

     Marc Delisle, for the team"
